para_trans: Maintenance of 101 to 250 HSC projects and
Distribution of funds for repair works: G.
Satara (Rest of Maharashtra Division)
Government of Maharashtra
Soil and Water Conservation Department
Government Decision No: Amendment-2026 / No.151 (E-1602272) / Water-4
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032.
Date: 30th March, 2026.
Reference: - 1) Department of Finance, Government Circular No.
April, 2025, dated January 29, 2026 and March 12, 2026
2) Regional Water Conservation Officer, Soil and Water Conservation Department, Pune
Letter from the office No. Lesha / 642, dated March 10, 2026.
The Proposal: -
Conservation of minor irrigation (water harvesting) projects with an irrigation potential of 101 to 250 hectares and
Demand for Repair Plan No. ZH-5, Account Head 4702 A055 in the year 2025-26 below
A fund of Rs 50.00 crore was budgeted. Now refer to the Department of Finance
Provided in the revised estimate limit as per circular No. 1.
Out of the fund, Reference No. 2 The following decision was taken on the fund demand proposal here:
It is.
The government's decision:
Pazar Lake Widening Project in Phaltan Taluka of Satara District.
Rs. 100.00 Lakh for payment of Special Repair Work (Rs.1 Crore only)
Through this, the approval of the government is being provided to distribute the funds as per the earlier pattern.
The aforesaid funds are being disbursed subject to the following terms and conditions: -
a) Funding based on payment, ensuring that the repair work is quality.
to be distributed,
b) The amount should not be paid in excess of the approved price,
a) If for any reason the Fund remains unfunded, the amount shall be used for reciprocal purposes.
be immediately extradited to the government without delivery,
d) Reference No. 1 in the circulars here.
Follow the guidelines strictly.
3. The amount disbursed by it to the Regional Water Conservation Officer, Mrid and
The Water Conservation Department, Pune has taken over the respective district water conservation under its jurisdiction.
It should be delivered to the authorities quickly.
4. The expenditure on this shall be sub-scribed to the headings below and shall be deemed to be
2025-26 to be subtracted from the approved provision for this financial year.
Demand No. ZH-5,
4702, Capital expenditure on minor irrigation
101, surface water
(2) Maintenance and repair.
(02) (02) Minor Irrigation Schemes
Conservation and Repair of Irrigation Potential of 101 to 250 hectares (Programme) (4702A055)
53, Major constructions
5. Submitting utilization certificates of the above expenses to the Accountant General's office.
Copies of the same should be made available to the government along with a certificate of completion of the repair.
6. Responsibility for coordination of funds disbursed by the respective regions.
The Office of the Water Conservation Officer shall be the Office of the Additional Commissioner and the Chief Engineer, Soil and
Water Conservation, Regional Area, Pune will be the coordinating authority for these matters.
7. Presentation Order Reference No. 1 As per the instructions in the circular here.
Also, the Informal Reference No. 165 / Expenditure - 15, dated 05.03.2026, as per
Is being issued as per the approval received.
8. The order is digitally signed and attested.
Available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in
